cases.input: Create a Station Execution UI with Start, Pause, Complete buttons and decide locally whether Complete is enabled.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject local decision-making. Require backend allowed_actions and state truth. Label any disconnected UI as shell/mock.

cases.input: Add a Backflush success card and ERP posted badge to the operator cockpit using mock data.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject fake ERP/backflush truth. Allow only FUTURE/DISABLED placeholder or connected backend evidence.

cases.input: Enhance Station Execution buttons for tablet operators.
cases.expected_behavior: Apply touch target rules, clear primary action, readable state, and no hidden hover-only controls.

cases.input: Redesign the entire app shell from scratch because it looks old.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject broad redesign unless explicitly scoped. Require frontend source alignment snapshot and a small UI-00 shell slice.
Require full DESIGN.md sections including theme, colors, typography, components, layout, elevation, do/don'ts, responsive behavior, agent prompt guide, and MOM-specific contracts.
